description: Design a Fiber-to-the-Home (FTTH) GPON network for a residential neighborhood in draw.io using the optical link budget parameters and topology distances provided in ~/Desktop/gpon_specs.txt. Create a hierarchical diagram showing the connection from the ISP's OLT to 3 Customer Homes (ONTs) via a Primary Splitter (1:4) and Secondary Splitters (1:8), using appropriate shapes for each component. Label the fiber segments with the specified distances and include a text label next to each House/ONT shape showing the calculated received signal strength (dBm) for House A, House B, and House C. Save the diagram as ~/Desktop/ftth_design.drawio and export it as a PDF to ~/Desktop/ftth_design.pdf.
